cards.back: The process of removing small objects or noise from an image, based on the identified neighboring pixels
The process of enlarging objects or noise in an image, based on the identified neighboring pixels
A combination of erosion followed by dilation, used to remove noise and small objects from an image
A combination of dilation followed by erosion, used to fill small holes or gaps in an image
A morphological operation that checks if a shape matches a given template, returning 1 if it matches and 0 otherwise
